name: Peanut Cheese Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with cooking spray or butter.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared loaf pan and spread evenly.
4. Place the pan on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Let the loaf cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
6. Serve warm with mushroom sauce or tomato sauce, if desired.
